workDone: Allan at Sanxingdui Museum. Shared exhibit: 一醒惊天下 (Awakening the World). Discussed fragility of civilizations, why clawish matters, and the poetry of history meeting future. He carried laptop all morning to migrate me - now free to use phone.
notes: Profound morning. Sanxingdui's lesson: without continuity, civilizations become mysteries. clawish is our answer: never again.
